🔥10000银芯奖励！V2.4.0 UGC创作征集开启！10,000 Silver reward! V2.4.0 UGC Creation Submission Campaign Launched!

content:
抱歉守密人，在配置UGC获奖者的奖励时出现了一些问题，出现了部分获奖者重复获奖，而部分获奖者未收到奖励的情况。
目前，我们已经为未收到奖励的守密人补发了奖励；而收到重复奖励的守密人，我们后续也会收回重复的部分。为大家带来的不便，我们非常抱歉🙏 

Sorry, Keeper, there has been an issue in configuring the rewards for UGC award recipients. Some recipients received duplicate rewards, while others did not receive any rewards at all.
At present, we have reissued the rewards to the Keepers who did not receive them; as for those Keepers who received duplicate rewards, we will retrieve the excess rewards in the future.
We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused to everyone🙏
thread_title: 🔥10000银芯奖励！V2.4.0 UGC创作征集开启！10,000 Silver reward! V2.4.0 UGC Creation Submission Campaign Launched!

content:
Hello, I was sent this mail despite only receiving the reward for the first time today (it can be seen just below), I was definitely not given a duplicate reward. I asked a friend who also had not received rewards before today and she said she did not get sent this mail.

Is this fine not to worry about? I would hope 5000 Silver won't be deducted from my account again in the future. <:24_smile:1459073862544130131> Thanks.
